action_set_definitions.name: get_comprehensive_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current environment state, including player stats, resources, world clock, and entity statuses (NPCs and officials) in one call to minimize time units.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_rule_citation
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the 'Rule_Reference_Accuracy' citation from the current season's official manual for a specific incident type.

incident_type.description: The specific type of incident to look up in the manual (e.g., 'dead-ball contact').

example_output.citation: Rule 12, Section II, Paragraph 4: Dead-ball Physicality

action_set_definitions.name: apply_behavioral_protocol
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a psychological or social protocol (e.g., 'Gray Rock') on a target player to neutralize hostility.

target_id.description: The unique ID of the player to target.

protocol_name.description: The name of the protocol to apply.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_official_citation
action_set_definitions.description: Provides a formal rule citation to a specific member of the officiating crew.

official_id.description: The ID of the official receiving the citation.

state_description.player_stats: Current status of the player character including health, energy, and level.
state_description.resources: Quantity of different currencies and raw materials owned.
state_description.current_location: The name of the current region or coordinate where the agent is located.
state_description.inventory: List of items currently held by the agent.
state_description.world_clock: Total number of turns or time units elapsed since start.
state_description.quest_log: Tracking of active and completed mission objectives.
state_description.environment_entities: Status of NPCs, enemies, or interactable objects in the immediate vicinity.
